name: MIA Apart
knownTraps: Wikimedia URLs → HTTP 429 (lesson 001) — FIXED 2026-04-16, replaced with Pexels

Panel title still shows system placeholder — needs manual fix in panel
Offer descriptions '.' for Mia Mare A, B, Saska Kępa — needs manual fix in panel

Booking engine param for guests is persons-adult (NOT persons/adults!) — FIXED 2026-04-16 (lesson 005)

Location param uses numeric IDs from locations.js, NOT city names — FIXED 2026-04-16 (lesson 007)
